actual_current_surface_status: exact-support / strict extremal moment certificate route specified, but current PR230 surface lacks the flat-extension/localizing certificate and therefore still has no pole atom/residue authority

assumptions_exercise.assumption: A positive scalar-source Stieltjes measure exists for the same PR230 source object.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: Hankel/localizing positivity would certify the wrong object or no positive measure at all.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: derive the measure from reflection positivity plus contact-subtracted scalar source; rerun monotonicity and Hankel checks on that exact object.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The finite source rows are actual moments of that measure, not shell-fit or contact-contaminated proxies.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: Moment-problem theorems do not apply to the data being promoted.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: produce source-coordinate, zero-source, contact-subtraction, and covariance metadata in the future certificate.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The pole location is same-surface and the shifted variable lambda has support lambda>=0.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: A localizing rank drop at lambda=0 is physically meaningless or tests the wrong spectral edge.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: derive scalar pole/gap theorem or direct pole-row measurement before rank-drop extraction.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The supplied moment order is high enough for flat extension/extremality.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: Block64 counterfamilies remain available and the atom/residue is not fixed.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: certify rank M_d=rank M_{d+1}, or extremal rank=variety cardinality plus consistency.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: PSD and rank decisions survive numerical/covariance uncertainty.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: Near-flat numerical spectra can hide nonflat families with different atom masses.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: use exact rational/algebraic moments or interval linear algebra with explicit rank gaps.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The atom at lambda=0 is isolated from continuum/threshold effects.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: A soft continuum can mimic finite-window pole behavior with zero atom residue.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: threshold/FVIR theorem with positive residue lower bound and limiting-order control.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The source-pole residue is the physical scalar LSZ residue or has a certified bridge to it.
assumptions_exercise.if_wrong: The route recovers only a source-channel atom, not canonical O_H or W/Z physical response.
assumptions_exercise.test_or_derivation: supply C_sH/C_HH rows, Gram purity, or same-surface physical-response bridge.

conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if a future same-surface scalar-source Stieltjes moment package supplies flat extension or extremal truncated-moment consistency, localizing rank drop at the pole, tight residue extraction, threshold/FVIR/contact authority, and canonical O_H or physical-response authority

current_prefix_obstruction_witness.obstruction: The current finite prefix m0..m2 cannot even form the higher moment matrices needed to check a flat rank-preserving extension.  Two positive completions agree on the prefix but differ in higher moments and in the pole atom at lambda=0.

exact_next_action: Produce outputs/yt_pr230_strict_extremal_moment_certificate_2026-05-12.json with the missing fields above, or abandon the moment route in favor of direct pole rows, a K'(pole) theorem, or a physical W/Z response bridge.

minimal_load_bearing_drivers: Cl(3)/Z3 compact scalar-source functional defines the source coordinate.
Reflection positivity gives finite-volume positive source-channel spectral sums.
A Stieltjes transform of a positive scalar measure turns pole residue into an atom mass.
Truncated moment theory fixes an atom only under determinacy/extremality/flat extension or tight Markov bounds with threshold authority.
Physical PR230 closure still needs canonical O_H/source-overlap or W/Z response authority.

flat_extension_atom_witness.variable: lambda = s - m_pole_squared, with certified support lambda >= 0

math_route_summary.sufficient_certificate: For the shifted spectral variable lambda>=0, exact moments through a flat order with PSD moment/localizing matrices and rank M_d = rank M_{d+1} determine a unique finite atomic representing measure.  A rank drop in the lambda-localizing matrix counts the atom at lambda=0; the atom weight is the source-pole residue for that scalar measure.
math_route_summary.why_current_surface_fails: The current surface does not provide the higher moments, rank-flat extension, extremal variety/consistency data, localizing rank drop, residue interval, threshold/FVIR/contact authority, or canonical/physical-response bridge.

parent_statuses.block58_compact_source_spectral_support: exact-support / Block58 finite-volume compact source-channel spectral support; thermodynamic pole/FVIR and canonical-O_H roots remain open
parent_statuses.block60_compact_source_taste_singlet_car: exact-support / Block60 compact additive source fixes the source-channel taste-singlet carrier coordinate; canonical O_H, pole residue, K-prime, and threshold/FVIR authority remain open
parent_statuses.block64_finite_moment_atom_residue_obstr: no-go / exact negative boundary for the current PR230 surface: finite source/Stieltjes moment prefixes do not fix the pole atom mass or scalar LSZ residue without an additional strict determinacy/extremality certificate
parent_statuses.carleman_tauberian_attempt: exact negative boundary / Carleman/Tauberian scalar-LSZ determinacy not derivable from current finite PR230 rows
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed

parent_statuses.polefit8x8_stieltjes_proxy_diagnostic: exact negative boundary / current polefit8x8 C_ss proxy fails Stieltjes monotonicity
parent_statuses.stieltjes_moment_gate: exact-support / FH-LSZ Stieltjes moment-certificate gate; strict positive certificate absent

proposal_allowed_reason: The current surface has finite source moments and source-carrier support only.  Block64 gives positive completions with the same finite prefix and different pole atom; no strict flat-extension or extremal localizing certificate is present.

strict_certificate_contract.required: contact-subtracted PR230 scalar-source Stieltjes measure with fixed source coordinate and zero-source limit
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: derive from compact source functional plus contact/FVIR theorem; reject current polefit8x8 C_ss proxy until monotonicity and contact checks pass

strict_certificate_contract.required: same-surface pole location m_pole^2 and shifted variable lambda=s-m_pole^2 with support lambda>=0
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: thermodynamic scalar pole/gap theorem or direct pole-row measurement with covariance

strict_certificate_contract.required: moments m0..m_{2d+2} with rigorous intervals tight enough to certify ranks, PSD, and localizing constraints
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: same-source moment production with rational/error certificates; not finite-shell fit reinterpretation

strict_certificate_contract.required: Hankel moment matrices and shifted/localizing matrices PSD on the declared support
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: principal-minor/eigenvalue lower bounds that survive covariance intervals

strict_certificate_contract.required: rank M_d = rank M_{d+1}, or extremal rank=variety-cardinality plus consistency, with localizing matrices
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: Curto-Fialkow flat extension or extremal truncated moment theorem certificate

strict_certificate_contract.required: rank drop in the lambda-localizing matrix proving exactly one atom at lambda=0
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: rank M_{d+1} - rank M_lambda = 1 after support has been shifted to the pole

strict_certificate_contract.required: atom list or equivalent recurrence/Vandermonde/Christoffel extraction with positive tight residue interval
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: verify atoms reproduce moments and residue interval relative width <= 0.02

strict_certificate_contract.required: thermodynamic threshold, finite-volume/IR limiting order, zero-mode, and contact-subtraction authority
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: independent FVIR/contact runner or microscopic denominator theorem

strict_certificate_contract.required: canonical O_H/source-overlap authority or same-surface W/Z physical-response bridge
strict_certificate_contract.test_or_derivation: direct C_sH/C_HH pole rows, Gram purity, or equivalent physical response certificate

strict_certificate_contract.required: no H_unit, Ward, y_t_bare, alpha_LM, plaquette/u0, observed targets, kappa_s=1, c2=1, or Z_match=1

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not treat finite moment prefixes as residue authority
does not use H_unit, Ward, y_t_bare, alpha_LM, plaquette/u0, observed targets, kappa_s=1, c2=1, or Z_match=1
does not identify source-pole residue with canonical O_H without a future bridge
